message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class FileRepository {
    format : ContentType
    hash : Hash
    hostedBy : Organization
    IRI : string
    name : string
    repositoryType : FileRepositoryType
    storageSize : QuantitativeValue
}

FileRepository --> "format" ContentType
FileRepository --> "hash" Hash
FileRepository --> "hostedBy" Organization
FileRepository --> "repositoryType" FileRepositoryType
FileRepository --> "storageSize" QuantitativeValue

@enduml
